results.rendered_html:
yaṅ A term for the sign of the Frequentative.
Comp.
— aṃtaṃ a term for the Atm. frequentative; e. g. bobhūyate from bhū.
— luk the omission of yaṅ i. e. the Paras. frequentative; e. g. bobhavīti from bhū.
